recipes.title: Build a reusable card with title, body, and action slots
recipes.description: Create a Composite card component with header, body, and footer regions you fill from any view.

recipes.title: Expose an enum property on an ElementComposite
recipes.description: Declare a typed enum property on an ElementComposite so it serializes to the correct web-component attribute value.

recipes.title: Show a success or error Toast after a save action
recipes.description: Use Toast.show with a success or danger theme to give the user immediate, non-blocking feedback after a server-side operation.

recipes.title: Fire a typed custom event from a Composite to its parent
recipes.description: Expose a typed event from a Composite using EventDispatcher so parent views can subscribe to custom domain events.

recipes.title: Hide a component on small screens with a media query
recipes.description: Use a sidecar CSS file with a media query to hide a region of the UI below a breakpoint.

recipes.title: Inject inline CSS into a page from Java
recipes.description: Use @InlineStyleSheet to add CSS class definitions directly from a Java component without a separate style sheet file.

recipes.title: Validate an email field as the user types, debounced
recipes.description: Combine the Debouncer with a text field's modify event so validation runs once typing pauses, not on every keystroke.

recipes.title: Show a multi-field form in a Dialog and save it with BindingContext
recipes.description: Open a Dialog pre-populated with a domain object, bind fields with BindingContext, and persist changes on save.

recipes.title: Disable a Button while a save operation runs
recipes.description: Prevent double-submit by disabling the button and updating its label for the duration of the operation, then restoring it when done.

recipes.title: Call a DOM method (like scrollIntoView) from Java
recipes.description: Use executeJs and the component keyword to invoke any DOM method on a component's underlying HTML element.

recipes.title: Center content in a FlexLayout
recipes.description: Use the FlexLayout component to center components horizontally and vertically

recipes.title: Block navigation when a form has unsaved changes
recipes.description: Implement WillLeaveObserver to prompt the user with a confirm dialog before discarding edits.

recipes.title: Set the browser tab title dynamically from a route parameter
recipes.description: Implement HasFrameTitle to generate a per-record page title from URL parameters so every detail view has a descriptive tab label.

recipes.title: Navigate to another view programmatically
recipes.description: Trigger programmatic navigation to a view class using Router.getCurrent().navigate().

recipes.title: Open a route in a new browser tab
recipes.description: Construct a route URL with the router and open it via Page.open so paths aren't hard-coded.

recipes.title: Read a query parameter from a route
recipes.description: Access URL query parameters inside a webforJ view using DidEnterObserver and ParametersBag.

recipes.title: Render a boolean column with custom icons in a Table
recipes.description: Replace true/false cell values with themed icons using BooleanRenderer so status columns are scannable at a glance.

recipes.title: Show an empty-state message when a Table has no rows
recipes.description: Toggle a placeholder message whenever the repository backing a Table becomes empty.

recipes.title: Add a toggle for the app's theme
recipes.description: Have a toggle component that switches the app's theme between a light and a dark mode.
